examples.title: GF Multiplication
examples.description: Convolution of two sequences via GF multiplication
examples.code:
FUNCTION MultiplyGF(G1, G2):
    INIT result as empty sequence
    FOR i FROM 0 TO LENGTH(G1):
        FOR j FROM 0 TO LENGTH(G2):
            result[i+j] += G1[i] * G2[j]
    RETURN result
examples.explanation: Implements polynomial multiplication through nested loops
